name: maung-tools
description: Maung Htike's catalog of agentic developer tools.

plugins.name: maungs-agentic-toolbelt
plugins.description: A project-agnostic, human-gated multi-agent agentic-workflow engine — a carpenter's toolbelt of 16 agents + 11 skills spanning plan -> build -> review -> wrap-up, plus bug diagnosis, code translation, chores, handoffs, scheduled cloud routines, a private per-project to-do backlog, and a self-maintaining codebase wiki. Runs on Claude Code (primary) and the OpenAI Codex CLI, with the Gemini CLI as the next work-in-progress port.
